aljazeera.title: US Rep Ro Khanna speaks out about being harassed by Israeli settlers

monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz Temporarily
— S3 · Political · Strait of Hormuz · 2m ago. Iran's IRGC Navy announces temporary closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint for global oil transit, via state broadcaster.
Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz After Striking Cargo Ship With Missile

— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 14m ago. Iranian state media reports the Strait of Hormuz is closed; IRGCN says it struck a vessel violating Iranian instructions, dramatically escalating the crisis.
Israeli Forces Demolish Buildings in Khan Younis, Gaza
— S3 · Conflict · Khan Younis, Gaza Strip, Palestine · 2h ago. Israeli forces are conducting demolitions in Khan Younis, southern Gaza, destroying buildings amid ongoing operations.
